gates.gate: Task orientation and parent evidence reviewed
gates.command_or_check: kanban_show(t_5ea2ca6c) plus reads of PRD, ARCHITECTURE, DEPLOYMENT, research artifacts, and implementation entrypoints
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: worker_context loaded; parent results reviewed; files read successfully
gates.rationale: Acceptance gates, constraints, parent caveats, and current implementation boundaries were inspected before drafting.

gates.command_or_check: python3 inline file existence/size/fence check over README, OPERATOR_RUNBOOK, TEMPLATE_LIBRARY, COLAB_GPU_GUIDE, BROWSER_ACCESS
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: exit 0; all five docs non-empty and code fences balanced
gates.rationale: All requested files were created in the required directory and passed basic structural validation.

gates.gate: Docs match current implementation and do not invent features
gates.command_or_check: manual/source-backed content check against hermes_cli/office_superpowers.py and scripts/office_*.py; Doctor/Watchdog/Outbox JSON smoke
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: doctor=0; watchdog=1 with current-board findings; outbox=0; valid JSON artifacts under /tmp/office_docs_*.json
gates.rationale: Docs label live Telegram sending and automatic destructive repair as not implemented in the MVP; Watchdog nonzero exit reflects actionable current-board findings, not invalid JSON.

gates.gate: Template library synthesizes FAANG/open-source research safely
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: exit 0; required terms present for SRE/transactional outbox/Cookiecutter/DVC/MLflow/Hugging Face/MLCommons/Colab/license cautions
gates.rationale: The library cites research-derived patterns and explicitly rejects unsafe copying or license-ambiguous imports.

gates.command_or_check: content verification for no local GPU, optional Colab, SCOPE_CHANGE_REQUEST, secrets, and artifact evidence
gates.rationale: The guide forbids local GPU claims and requires Colab/runtime artifacts or an honest scope-change request.

gates.command_or_check: content verification for browser boundary, cookies/profile limits, dashboard checks, logs, and blockers
gates.rationale: The guide separates safe browser/dashboard/log inspection from unavailable logged-in profile, cookie, credential, and human-login access.

gates.command_or_check: python3 regex scan for private keys, bearer tokens, token/secret/password assignments, and common API token prefixes over touched docs
gates.rationale: No obvious raw secret/token/private-key patterns were found in the new docs.

gates.gate: No npm installs or package mutations
gates.command_or_check: session command review plus git status scoped to package lockfiles
gates.exit_code_or_artifact: no npm/pnpm/yarn/npx commands executed; no package/lockfile changes in scoped status
gates.rationale: Only file, Python, shell, and Kanban tools were used; no JavaScript package install or lockfile mutation was performed.
